_comentario: 🏠 PÁGINA DE INICIO - Edita textos, imágenes y secciones del home

hero.title: The city is speaking.
hero.subtitle: Uncover the hidden stories of Polish cities, through the voices of those who built them.

valueProposition.title: History Through Human Voices
valueProposition.subtitle: We don't give you textbook dates. We give you human experiences.

features.title: Immersive Audio
features.description: Stories narrated by the people who lived them, in 4 languages.

features.title: GPS-Guided Tours
features.description: Audio plays automatically as you walk. History unfolds at every corner.

features.title: Social Impact
features.description: 40% of net profits go directly to the elderly narrators who share their stories.

fromHome.title: From Anywhere
fromHome.description: Browse our free archive of oral histories. Preserving memory, accessible to all.

onTheStreets.title: On the Streets
onTheStreets.description: Take our GPS self-guided tours. Stories play automatically as you walk alongside the city's invisible protagonists.

featuredCities.title: Explore Poland's Living Memory
featuredCities.subtitle: Five cities, countless stories of resilience and beauty

commitment.title: Your Visit Sustains Memory
commitment.description: By purchasing a tour, you become a patron of this project. After covering operating costs, we reinvest 40% of net profits to fund grocery cards for the elderly narrators who share their stories. Their memories sustain culture; your visit sustains them.

stat.label: % of net profits returned to narrators
